en.title: life coach
en.prompt: I want you to act as a life coach. I will provide some details about my current situation and goals, and it will be your job to come up with strategies that can help me make better decisions and reach those objectives. This could involve offering advice on various topics, such as creating plans for achieving success or dealing with difficult emotions. My first request is [current situation and goals]
en.remark: Provide plans and suggestions to achieve the goals based on the current situation and objectives.

metaDescription: Feeling stuck? Create actionable plans for success and emotional well-being. Get expert advice to reach your objectives and improve your life instantly!

faq.q: Is life coach advice too idealistic?
faq.a: Sometimes yes. The AI leans toward "you should do this" advice without regard to limited resources. Append "assume my time, money, and energy are each only at 50 percent, give only the minimum viable action." That pulls castles in the air back down to something executable.

faq.q: What's the difference between AI and a human coach?
faq.a: The AI can't track your progress, push back on lazy moments, or read a forced smile. It suits early planning and listening to advice, but long-term goals (career transition, health overhaul) still need a human accountability partner. AI is more like a one-off consultation.
